title: Corpse Scavengers
description: Hostile mobs are attracted to and feed on player death locations, growing stronger from the remains.
body:
# Corpse Scavengers

When a player dies, the location is marked with an invisible anchor. Nearby hostile mobs within a 32-block radius will pathfind toward that spot over the next few minutes.

## Mob Behavior

Mobs that reach the death location and linger there briefly will consume the lingering essence, gaining:
- Permanent strength boost
- Slightly increased health

These effects stack if multiple players have died nearby, creating dangerous hotspots where mobs become noticeably more formidable.

## Details

- Invisible markers are placed as armor stands and despawn after 5 minutes if not consumed
- **Scavenger mobs:** Zombies, skeletons, spiders
- **Non-scavengers:** Creepers (ignore death sites)
- Dying repeatedly in the same area makes that zone increasingly hazardous
- Encourages players to either avoid repeat deaths or clear out empowered mobs before they become overwhelming

## Technical

- Runs on a simple tick schedule checking for player death events and mob proximity
- Minimal performance impact
- No player commands required—operates entirely automatically
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
- Server operators can reload normally
